generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a responsible citizen, I've always believed in being prepared. But with the current administration cutting civil defense budgets, who's really looking out for our families? We can't afford to be complacent. Our neighbors in [nearby town] had to evacuate last year with no warning. We need to demand better preparedness, not just for us, but for our children's future. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
